languages.text: "Играть в догонялки бессмысленно. Пусть 32-ой заманивает их в ловушки и уничтожает".
"Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."
languages.original_text: "Играть в догонялки бессмысленно. Пусть 32-ой заманивает их в ловушки и уничтожает".

traits.locale_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."
"Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."
"Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

languages.text: 「追いかけるのは無駄だ。32番は罠に誘い込んで破壊できる」
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: 「追いかけるのは無駄だ。32番は罠に誘い込んで破壊できる」

languages.text: «No merece la pena perseguir a las criaturas. El 32.º puede atraerlas a trampas y destruirlas».
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: «No merece la pena perseguir a las criaturas. El 32.º puede atraerlas a trampas y destruirlas».

languages.text: “追着这些东西跑毫无意义。让第32团设下陷阱，引它们进来，一网打尽。”
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: “追着这些东西跑毫无意义。让第32团设下陷阱，引它们进来，一网打尽。”

languages.text: "Es bringt nichts, diese Dinger zu jagen. Die 32. soll sie in Fallen locken und vernichten."
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: "Es bringt nichts, diese Dinger zu jagen. Die 32. soll sie in Fallen locken und vernichten."

languages.text: "O şeylerin peşinden koşmak anlamsız. 32. Alay onları tuzaklara çekip yok edebilir."
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: "O şeylerin peşinden koşmak anlamsız. 32. Alay onları tuzaklara çekip yok edebilir."

languages.text: « Inutile de prendre ces bêtes en chasse. Le 32e régiment les attirera dans des pièges pour les annihiler. »
languages.original_text: "Chasing after the things is pointless. The 32nd can lure them into traps and destroy them."

traits.locale_text: « Inutile de prendre ces bêtes en chasse. Le 32e régiment les attirera dans des pièges pour les annihiler. »
